name: Red Curry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Prik chi fa daeng (red jalapenos), sliced finely
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a sauce base by frying the garlic and shallots in oil until they change color and become aromatic.
2. Add the chili paste to the wok, stirring until combined and aromatic.
3. Pour in the coconut milk and heat until nearly boiling.
4. Gradually add the chili paste, stirring until dissolved.
5. Incorporate the remaining ingredients (red jalapenos, ginger, fish sauce, and sugar) and stir until heated through.
6. Adjust the amounts of garlic, shallots, and chili paste as desired, keeping the other ingredients in proportion.
7. Taste and adjust the seasoning with ginger and fish sauce to achieve the desired flavor balance.
